text: Stepping into this environment, I am immediately confronted by the interplay of transparency and enclosure—a glass wall stands between me and a vibrant, enigmatic space. The bright, angular lights above illuminate my path and sharpen my awareness of boundaries, both physical and conceptual. Entering further, I am greeted by a rich burst of color marked 'R+D,' signaling a domain of inquiry and progress. Surrounded by text, screens, and artifacts, I sense anticipation and curiosity. The arrangement invites reflection: how do we, as human beings, relate to our environments and the relentless forward motion of knowledge? I feel intrigued and alive, eager to absorb the ideas in the air.
